reason: The paper describes the generation and evaluation of orbit and clock corrections for the BDS-3 PPP-B2b service.
main_results: The paper describes the orbit and clock correction generation for PPP-B2b and evaluates the accuracy of these corrections for GPS and BDS-3 satellites. Specific quantitative results are not in the provided text snippet.
datasets: PPP-B2b broadcast corrections (Type 1-4 messages) and possibly IGS products for comparison. The text does not list specific datasets in the snippet.
